text: {"claims":[{"statement":"University of Asmara is located in Eritrea","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [University of Asmara](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Asmara \"University of Asmara\")","entailment":"The bullet list under the Eritrea flag includes University of Asmara, indicating its location in Eritrea.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"University of Eswatini is located in Eswatini","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [University of Eswatini](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Eswatini \"University of Eswatini\")","entailment":"The bullet list under the Eswatini flag lists University of Eswatini, showing it is situated in Eswatini.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"},{"statement":"University of Kinshasa is located in the Democratic Republic of the Congo","claimType":"definitional","quote":"- [University of Kinshasa](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/University_of_Kinshasa \"University of Kinshasa\")","entailment":"The bullet list under the Democratic Republic of the Congo flag includes University of Kinshasa, indicating its location there.","population":"","intervention":"","comparator":"","outcome":"","timeframe":"","quantifiers":"","modality":"definitional"}]}
